name: Lightless Bottom
descriptionTemplate:
When this character is in the team, the {Aequor Realm} transforms into {Benthos: Aequor} Realm.
Base {Tentacle DMG} is changed to 5% of the team's Max HP.
Team DMG Amplification +50% after exploration begins (Effect doubled if the team is entirely {Aequor} and {Chaos} Awakeners, though no additional starting Tentacles will be obtained).
Tentacle Gathering effect is removed.
Tentacle Stance changes to {Benthos: Tentacle Stance}.
{Benthos: Tranquil Sea}: Immediately generate Shield equal to 25% Max HP, and Tentacles will no longer attack at turn end; 3 turns cooldown.
{Benthos: Raging Waves}: {Tentacle DMG} × 125% for the turn; after dealing Active DMG, 1 Tentacle attacks; lose 1 Tentacle at turn end; 3 turns cooldown.
Realm Mastery is counted as {Benthos: Aequor Mastery}. Each point provides: {Tranquil Sea} Stance's Shield Generation +0.025% Max HP. {Raging Waves} Stance's {Tentacle DMG} +0.025%.
"Benthos: Realm Mastery" effect doubles if the team is entirely {Aequor} and {Chaos} Awakeners.
